projectScope: multi-project; Cinepolis rules only when projectConfig.projectKey == cinepolis
purpose: Define a safe preview validator and source-safe mapping rules for June liquidations, Cinepolis Boleto/Combo reimbursements, payment batches, individual movements and historical payment reconciliation without reading raw real files or executing writes.
mappingRules: June visits already executed are payment/liquidation preview rows, not pending visit execution rows.
Visit performed alone does not create payable status.
Questionnaire completed alone does not create payable status.
Submitido/review policy must be satisfied before candidate_ready unless a documented admin exception exists.
Cinepolis Boleto maps to boletoAmount only for Cinepolis project configuration.
Cinepolis Combo maps to comboAmount only for Cinepolis project configuration.
reimbursementTotal = boletoAmount + comboAmount unless project/country override exists with audit note.
If visitId/hrRowId/sourceVisitRef is missing, route to manual_review_required.
If a paid row lacks historicalPaymentRef or manualPaymentConfirmationRef, route to held_for_conflict/manual_review_required.
Historical May/July payments must reconcile before closing new June batches.
No visual-only dedupe is allowed; ambiguous matches require manual review.
outputRules: Validator prints JSON report only; it must not write output files by default.
Report may include mappedRows only from synthetic/sanitized input.
Report must include manualReviewCount and warnings for empty/no June preview input.
Report must keep runtimeEnabled, productionAllowed, firestoreWritesAllowed, hrWriteAllowed and paymentProviderAllowed false.
backendNextBlocks: Add assignment sync conflict preview validator.
Add sensitive data policy for bank, DPI, NDA, correo and attachments before real import.
Prepare Make payload draft without activation after mapping validators are stable.
claudePrototypeImpact: Admin financial UI must show source-safe preview/review states, not real payment execution.
Mis beneficios must separate honorarium, Boleto, Combo, total, pending, scheduled and paid without bank data.
Payment batch UI must allow selected items and preserve individual movements.
Ambiguous rows must show manual review, not auto-deduped or auto-paid.
Texts must not promise HR sync, payment, email, Make or real automation while gates are off.

newLessons: How source-safe preview works before real import
Why June visits are executed but payment pending
How Boleto and Combo map safely
Why paid needs a stable payment reference
How manual review protects against duplicated payments
What shoppers can see without bank data
interactiveChecklists: Before preparing a June payment batch
Before marking a payment as paid

hardStops: Do not read raw real HR/liquidation/payment files with this validator.
Do not write Firestore from this validator.
Do not write HR from this validator.
Do not execute real payments from this validator.
Do not store or display bank, DPI, NDA or raw attachments.
Do not auto-dedupe by shopper name or visual similarity.
Do not mark paid without historicalPaymentRef or manualPaymentConfirmationRef.
Do not treat questionnaire completed as submitido or paid.
